case_title: MICHAEL MURRAY KAVANAGH VS. SHAWMAN GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAVANAGH, MICHAEL MURRAY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAWMAN GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA FLUID BAR AND LOUNGE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAVANAGH, MICHAEL MURRAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAWMAN GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA FLUID BAR AND LOUNGE $13,443.50 PRINCIPAL, $30.68 INTEREST, $385.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,859.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
